baseUrl.description: Endpoint URL without the secret. Use this together with the `secret` field via the `Authorization: Bearer <secret>` header so the secret stays out of access/CDN/APM logs. The OpenTelemetry SDK appends /v1/logs, /v1/metrics, or /v1/traces automatically.

secret.description: 48-character secret authenticating writes to this source. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer <secret>` to the `baseUrl`.

url.description: Endpoint URL with the secret embedded as the last path segment. Convenient for SDKs that authenticate by URL only. The OpenTelemetry SDK automatically appends /v1/logs, /v1/metrics, or /v1/traces based on the signal type — do not append a signal path yourself. Most SDK exporters reject or silently strip the suffix.
